name: Immunefi
description: $IMU - The Immunefi token is the central value creation asset powering onchain security. The next multi-trillion dollar unlock for the onchain economy isn’t capital, it’s security. Every protocol, DeFi app, and onchain company needs always-on protection to survive. Powered by $IMU, the Immunefi Magnus platform stands at the center of the next trillion-dollar wave. As more protocols join Magnus, more researchers contribute, and community members participate, demand for onchain security grows. $IMU is at the heart of this transformation, the asset powering complete security for web3.
